name: Sawmill Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add the melted margarine, water, vinegar, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients. Mix until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 30-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Allow the cake to cool before serving.
